scenarios.title: Offline field observation reaches approval

scenarios.goal: Offline field observation reaches approval; preserve the exact fixture evidence and reach an accountable, inspectable disposition.
scenarios.context: Offline field observation reaches approval uses FIX-002 from WFI-0001 in OPR-001. Scope includes BLK-001 under CON-003; the selected path spans 2026-01-04T06:00:00-08:00 through 2026-01-05T06:00:00-08:00.
preconditions: The actor assignments ASG-002, ASG-001 are effective for the referenced scope.
The current state and source versions match the base evidence before TRN-WF-001-001.
Stable block, contract, workflow-instance, event, and record identities resolve without alias ambiguity.
available_information: 3 exact events: EVT-00007, EVT-00009, EVT-00011
4 connected record instances with canonical definitions and versions
2 accountable decision contracts: DEC-001, DEC-002

Workflow-local correlation, scope, and record lineage
missing_information: The device cannot know whether server state or authority changed after its cached base version until synchronization occurs.
normal_path: EVT-00007 applies TRN-WF-001-001: entry → observed; A seasonal, field, weather, winery, certification, or equipment signal is recorded against a stable block identity.
EVT-00009 applies TRN-WF-001-002: observed → planned; The accountable specialist defines whether work is needed, its scope, timing, method, and operational constraints.
EVT-00011 applies TRN-WF-001-003: planned → approved; The manager approves, revises, escalates, or declines the proposed work according to cost, safety, compliance, and delegated authority.

handoff.communication: observed evidence and current record versions pass to the owner of TRN-WF-001-002.
planned evidence and current record versions pass to the owner of TRN-WF-001-003.
The accountable terminal evidence remains available to authorized reviewers and downstream linked workflows.

exception_path: EVT-00007 exposes the scenario's offline delayed pressure at entry → observed.
The interface preserves affected scope, actor ASG-002, base record versions, timing, and the explicit non-ideal rationale.
recovery_path: EVT-00009 performs TRN-WF-001-002 toward planned without erasing predecessor evidence.
EVT-00011 performs TRN-WF-001-003 toward approved without erasing predecessor evidence.
branches: If authority, effective scope, or current state no longer resolves, deny the action and route to the accountable owner.
If source evidence is stale, missing, offline, or conflicting, preserve the attempted event and require explicit reconciliation.
If a value is wrong, append a correction or supersession and retain reciprocal predecessor/successor lineage.
If outside-party acknowledgement or evidence is required, remain pending or safely contained rather than inferring consent.
communications: ROLE-VITICULTURIST hands planned evidence to ROLE-VINEYARD-MANAGER for approved.
scenarios.device_context: Field mobile captures offline-safe evidence; responsive desktop reviews sync consequences and accountable state changes.
scenarios.connectivity: At least one event is captured offline. The device journal retains occurred time and base versions; server synchronization is idempotent and conflicts require explicit resolution.
compliance_implications: Every consequential event remains attributable to person, assignment, organization, occurred time, captured time, reason, and record versions.
Corrections, supersessions, rejections, disputes, and safe terminal containment remain in immutable history.
Cross-organization evidence is visible only within effective contract, relationship, scope, sensitivity, and authority boundaries.

expected_transitions.reason: TRN-WF-004-001 · The viticulturist samples representative vines and clusters using a recorded method and block context.

TRN-WF-006-003 · Transportation carries the identified load and its documentation to the assigned winery intake within the agreed window.
TRN-WF-006-004 · Winery intake verifies load and block identity, records weight, and preserves the intake sample and condition evidence.
TRN-WF-006-012 · Hold disposition until intake quality evidence is available.
TRN-WF-006-028 · Contain rejected or downgraded load and preserve the affected scope before recovery.
TRN-WF-006-017 · Enter the rejected disposition for contract and settlement handling.
TRN-WF-006-007 · Grower-relations compares the vineyard, transport, intake, buyer-system, quality, and contract records and opens a dispute or correction when they differ.
TRN-WF-006-008 · Finance uses the accepted and reconciled record set to produce settlement inputs while preserving later adjustment authority and history.
TRN-WF-009-001 · Grower, organization, vineyard, block, contract, spray, certification, and quality information is assembled without assuming identifiers already agree.
TRN-WF-009-021 · Contain conflicting block aliases and preserve the affected scope before recovery.
TRN-WF-009-017 · Route the disputed issue to corrective or commercial resolution.
TRN-WF-009-018 · Verify the corrective result and restore an aligned operating state.
TRN-WF-009-005 · The relationship owner confirms that seasonal reporting, delivery, quality, and agreed obligations are fulfilled or explicitly excepted.
TRN-WF-009-006 · Finance and grower-relations reconcile delivery, commercial adjustment, dispute, and settlement history across both organizations.
TRN-WF-009-007 · The completed relationship version becomes historical while renewal, amendment, suspension, or ending creates a separately attributable successor state.
TRN-WF-010-001 · The compliance coordinator maps the active standard and vintage to each site, block, activity, contractor, and buyer relationship.
TRN-WF-010-002 · Evidence owners are assigned to collect ordinary operational records, plans, training, separation, cleaning, transport, input, and annual measurement evidence.
TRN-WF-010-003 · The coordinator checks completeness, attribution, applicability, and internal consistency before preparing the package.
TRN-WF-010-004 · The vineyard manager attests to the prepared package and authorizes submission without replacing independent audit authority.
TRN-WF-010-005 · The auditor reviews submitted and observed evidence against the identified standard and records compliant, evidence-needed, or noncompliant findings.
TRN-WF-010-025 · Contain certification withheld until corrective action and preserve the affected scope before recovery.
TRN-WF-010-014 · Open corrective action for the finding that withheld certification.
TRN-WF-010-015 · Execute the approved remediation while preserving the original finding.
TRN-WF-010-016 · Submit attributed corrective evidence for independent review.
TRN-WF-010-017 · Verify that corrective evidence resolves the recorded finding.
TRN-WF-010-007 · The certifier issues the certification decision for the compliant review without implying corrective action occurred.
TRN-WF-010-008 · The completed certification cycle remains immutable and is archived when a new standard vintage or annual cycle becomes current.
